title: Gilded Dark GUI
description: A Gilded dark GUI. Black and Yellow, Like Netherite and Gold.
body:
## 🖤 Gilded Dark GUI
Gilded Dark GUI is a clean and modern resource pack that gives Minecraft’s interface a sleek dark mode, enriched with black and gold tones inspired by **gold** and **netherite**.
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04011a4cb5a767641e6931d81b77fd356679dc2d_0.webp)
🔸 Polished black & gold design  
🔸 Modern, minimalist feel  
🔸 Fully vanilla-friendly – only GUI textures are changed  
🔸 No blocks, items, or sounds are modified

---
This pack is perfect for players who want a more elegant, immersive GUI without altering the core Minecraft experience.
